tools.name: get_agentspec_reference
tools.description: The exact AgentSpec JSON schema + indicator list + grade-report shape. Read this BEFORE constructing a spec for grade_strategy. Free, no key needed.

tools.name: grade_strategy
tools.description: Backtest + grade an AgentSpec on 6 years of real data: 60/40 chronological train/OOS split, fees modeled, five hard gates (positive OOS expectancy, clears cost hurdle, robust across assets, survivable drawdown, not overfit). Returns the full grade report and a permanent public verify URL. Requires a

tools.name: grade_code
tools.description: Submit STRATEGY SOURCE CODE directly — TradingView Pine Script, Python (freqtrade/backtrader), MQL4/5, or pseudocode. Tessen's own porter translates it to AgentSpec with a fidelity report (preserved/approximated/dropped) and then grades it on the same engine and gates as grade_strategy. Code whose c

tools.name: grade_trade_record
tools.description: Grade the caller's OWN trade history (>=30 trades) instead of a backtest — chronologically 60/40 split, same gates. Marked 'Checked' not 'Verified' since the data is self-supplied. Requires an API key.

tools.name: get_grade_report
tools.description: Fetch any existing grade by its gradeId (the id in a tessen.ai/verify/... URL). Free, no key needed.

tools.name: get_corpus_insights
tools.description: Honest aggregates over every strategy ever graded on Tessen: grade distribution, gate fail rates, the win-rate trap, and timeframe/indicator bucket base rates. Free, no key needed.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_grade_report · Private data: grade_strategy, grade_code, grade_trade_record · Public sink: grade_code.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_grade_report · Private data: grade_strategy, grade_code, grade_trade_record · Public sink: grade_code

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
